description: arXiv:2607.17994v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Video understanding has become more and more important with the growth of Artificial Intelligence (AI) for video generation. Recently, Multimodal Large Language Model(M-LLM) has shown its capability in video understanding. Video summarization, a specific domain of video understanding, has proven its importance for efficient navigation and retrie...
author: Rui Chu, Yingjie Lao
